// ==== koine/generated/sales/CustomerId.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.sales

/**
 * A strongly-typed identity value referenced by this context but owned elsewhere.
 */
@JvmInline
value class CustomerId(val value: java.util.UUID)

// ==== koine/generated/sales/DomainEvent.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.sales

/**
 * Every domain event this context can raise — a sealed sum a recorded-events list can hold.
 */
sealed interface DomainEvent

// ==== koine/generated/sales/Money.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.sales

data class Money(
    val amount: java.math.BigDecimal,
) {
    init {
        if (!(amount.compareTo(java.math.BigDecimal.ZERO) >= 0)) throw koine.runtime.DomainException("an amount cannot be negative")
    }
}

// ==== koine/generated/sales/Order.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.sales

class Order(
    id: OrderId,
    customer: CustomerId,
) {
    val id: OrderId = id
    val customer: CustomerId = customer

    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
        this === other || (other is Order && this.id == other.id)

    override fun hashCode(): Int = this.id.hashCode()
}

// ==== koine/generated/sales/OrderId.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.sales

/**
 * A strongly-typed identity value for Order.
 */
@JvmInline
value class OrderId(val value: java.util.UUID) {
    companion object {
        /**
         * Mints a fresh, random identity (a v4 UUID).
         */
        fun generate(): OrderId = OrderId(java.util.UUID.randomUUID())
    }
}

// ==== koine/generated/sales/OrderPlaced.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.sales

data class OrderPlaced(
    val orderId: OrderId,
    val total: Money,
) : DomainEvent

// ==== koine/generated/sales/OrderRepository.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.sales

/**
 * Persistence-ignorant repository contract for the Order aggregate root.
 */
interface OrderRepository {
    /**
     * Loads the aggregate by its identity, or null if absent.
     */
    fun getById(id: OrderId): Order?

    /**
     * Persists a new aggregate.
     */
    fun add(aggregate: Order)

    /**
     * Persists changes to an existing aggregate.
     */
    fun update(aggregate: Order)

    fun byCustomer(customer: CustomerId): List<Order>

    fun mostRecent(customer: CustomerId): Order?
}

// ==== koine/generated/sales/OrderShipped.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.sales

data class OrderShipped(
    val orderId: OrderId,
) : DomainEvent

// ==== koine/runtime/Runtime.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.runtime

/**
 * Thrown when a domain invariant is violated. An unchecked exception (every Kotlin exception is
 * unchecked) so generated value objects, entities, and aggregates can guard their invariants without
 * ceremony — the Kotlin analogue of the C# emitter's DomainInvariantViolationException and the JVM
 * sibling's koine.runtime.DomainException.
 *
 * Generated by Koine — do not edit by hand.
 */
class DomainException(message: String) : RuntimeException(message)

/**
 * A closed interval [start, end] over a Comparable type — the Kotlin analogue of the JVM sibling's
 * koine.runtime.Range. The caller is responsible for start <= end (a domain invariant).
 *
 * Generated by Koine — do not edit by hand.
 */
data class Range<T : Comparable<T>>(val start: T, val end: T) {
    /** True when [value] lies within the closed interval [start, end]. */
    fun contains(value: T): Boolean = start <= value && value <= end

    /** True when this interval and [other] share at least one point. */
    fun overlaps(other: Range<T>): Boolean = start <= other.end && other.start <= end
}
